1: And in thy salvation how greatly shall he rejoice!
2: And hast not withholden the request of his lips. Selah. Selah.
3: Thou settest a crown of pure gold on his head.
4: Even Even length of days for ever and ever.
5: Honour and majesty hast thou laid upon him.
6: Thou hast made him exceeding glad with thy countenance.
7: And through the mercy of the Most High he shall not be moved.
8: Thy right hand shall find out those that hate thee.
9: The LORD LORD shall swallow them up in his wrath, and the fire shall devour them.
10: And their seed from among the children of men.
11: They imagined a mischievous device, which which they are not able to perform to perform .
12: When When thou shalt make ready thine arrows thine arrows upon thy strings against the face of them.
13: So So will we sing and praise thy power.
